description_long: This airplane features a sleek, angular design with a predominantly black and orange color scheme accented by a blue-tinted cockpit canopy. The fuselage is low and wide, with sharply contoured panels and visible rivet details, giving it a futuristic, armored appearance. The wings are integrated into the body with a low-wing configuration and have multiple rearward-extending fins or strakes, enhancing its aerodynamic profile. The cockpit is centrally located and slightly raised, with a faceted, enclosed canopy that suggests a single-seat configuration. The nose is pointed and reinforced, while the rear tapers with additional stabilizing fins. No visible engines or landing gear are present, emphasizing a streamlined, possibly conceptual or stealth-inspired design.
description: A futuristic, angular black and orange airplane with a blue-tinted central cockpit and integrated low wings featuring multiple rear fins. The design is sleek, armored, and highly aerodynamic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, central blue cockpit canopy, and the wide, angular wings with rear fins.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the low, elongated fuselage, the raised cockpit, and the layered wing and fin structure.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the tapered tail, multiple rear fins, and the armored paneling along the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the streamlined profile and the arrangement of the wings and fins.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with integrated, swept wings and multiple rearward fins; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Unconventional tail with multiple rear fins and no distinct vertical stabilizer; appears to be a custom or stealth-inspired configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Centrally located, slightly raised, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a faceted blue canopy.
